title: 要検証・他者の介在による偶発性

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day at the training track...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What should I do for training today? Hm,
considering the skies are cloudy...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What good timing. You there! I'd like your input
on something!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What will you be focusing on today? Researching
a new running style, or quick decision-making?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, an excellent choice! The running techniques
of Umamusume are always improving.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I see. The success or failure of a race hinges on
split-second decisions, which makes the speed of
one's thinking important indeed.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I shall take that into consideration. I wonder what
results will come of this chance meeting.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Happenstance and serendipity are factors that
cannot be ignored in research.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That is why I took advantage of two chance
occurrences—you and the cloudy skies.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You too should embrace happenstance to avoid
falling into a rut! Doing so is the path to truth!
